part.text:
I'll rename `CreateStaticCredentialPasswordCli` to `CreateStaticCredentialUsernamePasswordCli` across the repository.

First, let me search for all occurrences:

state.output:
<path>/private/var/folders/9f/txt0j2rs2wx3lqx9vfj9x3240000gn/T/BenchmarkRenameqwen3.5-9b-udq4boundary_06d69f69raw158484475/005/boundary/testing/internal/e2e/boundary/credential.go</path>
<type>file</type>

200: 	credentialId := createCredentialResult.Item.Id
201: 	t.Logf("Created SSH Private Key Credentials: %s", credentialId)
202: 	return credentialId, nil
203: }
204: 
205: // CreateStaticCredentialPasswordCli uses the cli to create a new password credential in the
206: // provided static credential store.
207: // Returns the id of the new credential
208: func CreateStaticCredentialPasswordCli(t testing.TB, ctx context.Context, credentialStoreId string, user string, password string) (string, error) {
209: 	name, err := base62.Random(16)
210: 	if err != nil {
211: 		return "", err
212: 	}
213: 
214: 	output := e2e.RunCommand(ctx, "boundary",
215: 		e2e.WithArgs(
216: 			"credentials", "create", "username-password",
217: 			"-credential-store-id", credentialStoreId,
218: 			"-username", user,
219: 			"-password", "env://E2E_CREDENTIALS_PASSWORD",
220: 			"-name", fmt.Sprintf("e2e Credential %s", name),
221: 			"-description", "e2e",
222: 			"-format", "json",
223: 		),
224: 		e2e.WithEnv("E2E_CREDENTIALS_PASSWORD", password),
225: 	)
226: 	if output.Err != nil {
227: 		return "", fmt.Errorf("%w: %s", output.Err, string(output.Stderr))
228: 	}
229: 

(Showing lines 200-229 of 359. Use offset=230 to continue.)

state.title: testing/internal/e2e/boundary/credential.go

part.text: Now I need to find where it's declared. Let me check the boundary/credential.go file:

===================================================================
--- /private/var/folders/9f/txt0j2rs2wx3lqx9vfj9x3240000gn/T/BenchmarkRenameqwen3.5-9b-udq4boundary_06d69f69raw158484475/005/boundary/testing/internal/e2e/tests/database/migration_test.go

@@ -267,9 +267,9 @@
 
 // Create static credentials
 storeId, err := boundary.CreateCredentialStoreStaticCli(t, ctx, projectId)
 require.NoError(t, err)
-_, err = boundary.CreateStaticCredentialPasswordCli(t, ctx, storeId, c.TargetSshUser, "password")
+_, err = boundary.CreateStaticCredentialUsernamePasswordCli(t, ctx, storeId, c.TargetSshUser, "password")
 require.NoError(t, err)
 _, err = boundary.CreateStaticCredentialJsonCli(t, ctx, storeId, "testdata/credential.json")
 require.NoError(t, err)
 credentialsId, err := boundary.CreateStaticCredentialPrivateKeyCli(t, ctx, storeId, c.TargetSshUser, c.TargetSshKeyPath)

 privateKeyCredentialsId, err := boundary.CreateStaticCredentialPrivateKeyCli(t, ctx, storeId, c.TargetSshUser, testPemFile)
 require.NoError(t, err)
-pwCredentialId, err := boundary.CreateStaticCredentialPasswordCli(t, ctx, storeId, c.TargetSshUser, testPassword)
+pwCredentialId, err := boundary.CreateStaticCredentialUsernamePasswordCli(t, ctx, storeId, c.TargetSshUser, testPassword)
 require.NoError(t, err)

 require.NoError(t, err)
 updCredentialId, err := boundary.CreateStaticCredentialPasswordDomainCli(t, ctx, storeId, c.TargetSshUser, testPassword, testDomain)
